root_text.sn42.5:1.1: Atha kho assāroho gāmaṇi yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho assāroho gāmaṇi bhagavantaṁ etadavoca:
root_text.sn42.5:1.2: “sutaṁ metaṁ, bhante, pubbakānaṁ ācariyapācariyānaṁ assārohānaṁ bhāsamānānaṁ:
root_text.sn42.5:1.3: ‘yo so assāroho saṅgāme ussahati vāyamati, tamenaṁ ussahantaṁ vāyamantaṁ pare hananti pariyāpādenti, so kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā parajitānaṁ devānaṁ sahabyataṁ upapajjatī’ti.
root_text.sn42.5:1.5: “Alaṁ, gāmaṇi, tiṭṭhatetaṁ; mā maṁ etaṁ pucchī”ti.
root_text.sn42.5:2.2: tatiyampi kho assāroho gāmaṇi bhagavantaṁ etadavoca:
root_text.sn42.5:2.3: “sutaṁ metaṁ, bhante, pubbakānaṁ ācariyapācariyānaṁ assārohānaṁ bhāsamānānaṁ:
root_text.sn42.5:2.4: ‘yo so assāroho saṅgāme ussahati vāyamati, tamenaṁ ussahantaṁ vāyamantaṁ pare hananti pariyāpādenti, so kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā parajitānaṁ devānaṁ sahabyataṁ upapajjatī’ti.
root_text.sn42.5:3.2: ‘alaṁ, gāmaṇi, tiṭṭhatetaṁ; mā maṁ etaṁ pucchī’ti.
root_text.sn42.5:3.4: Yo so, gāmaṇi, assāroho saṅgāme ussahati vāyamati tassa taṁ cittaṁ pubbe gahitaṁ dukkaṭaṁ duppaṇihitaṁ:
root_text.sn42.5:3.5: ‘ime sattā haññantu vā bajjhantu vā ucchijjantu vā vinassantu vā mā ahesuṁ iti vā’ti.
root_text.sn42.5:3.6: Tamenaṁ ussahantaṁ vāyamantaṁ pare hananti pariyāpādenti, so kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā parajito nāma nirayo tattha upapajjati.
root_text.sn42.5:3.7: Sace kho panassa evaṁ diṭṭhi hoti:
root_text.sn42.5:3.8: ‘yo so assāroho saṅgāme ussahati vāyamati, tamenaṁ ussahantaṁ vāyamantaṁ pare hananti pariyāpādenti, so kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā parajitānaṁ devānaṁ sahabyataṁ upapajjatī’ti, sāssa hoti micchādiṭṭhi.
root_text.sn42.5:3.9: Micchādiṭṭhikassa kho panāhaṁ, gāmaṇi, purisapuggalassa dvinnaṁ gatīnaṁ aññataraṁ gatiṁ vadāmi—
root_text.sn42.5:4.1: Evaṁ vutte, assāroho gāmaṇi parodi, assūni pavattesi.
root_text.sn42.5:4.3: ‘alaṁ, gāmaṇi, tiṭṭhatetaṁ; mā maṁ etaṁ pucchī’”ti.
root_text.sn42.5:4.4: “Nāhaṁ, bhante, etaṁ rodāmi yaṁ maṁ bhagavā evamāha.
root_text.sn42.5:4.5: Api cāhaṁ, bhante, pubbakehi ācariyapācariyehi assārohehi dīgharattaṁ nikato vañcito paluddho:
root_text.sn42.5:4.6: ‘yo so assāroho saṅgāme ussahati vāyamati, tamenaṁ ussahantaṁ vāyamantaṁ pare hananti pariyāpādenti, so kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā parajitānaṁ devānaṁ sahabyataṁ upapajjatī’”ti.

translation_text.sn42.5:1.1: Then a cavalry chief went up to the Buddha …
translation_text.sn42.5:4.8: “From this day forth, may the Buddha remember me as a lay follower who has gone for refuge for life.”
